name: Out-of-The-Ordinary Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. In a frying pan, saute meat until lightly browned.
2. Pour off drippings.
3. Add water, chili, and curry powder; simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Add tomatoes and beans; heat through.
5. Stir in onions.
6. Ladle into serving bowls and sprinkle with cheese.
